---
title: "Biomass Atlas"
subtitle: "Aboveground Biomass Under Management Scenarios"
author: "Akash B V"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
lightbox: true
---

Aboveground biomass (AGB) represents the total mass of living plant material above the soil surface -- stems, leaves, and reproductive structures. For annual crops, AGB is a snapshot of standing biomass at the modeled time point. Because these are harvested crops, end-of-season AGB values are typically small. See the [Scenario Definition Table](atlas_overview.qmd#tbl-scenario-def) for practice parameters and simulation details.

::: {.callout-warning}
## Validation Status

These results are from a proof-of-concept modeling framework that has not been validated against field observations. Interpret all values as illustrative projections, not empirical estimates.
:::

::: {.callout-note}
## Context for AGB values

AGB in annual croplands reflects biomass remaining after harvest. Statewide totals are very small (~40 Mg total across all fields) compared to soil carbon pools (~112 Tg C). For tillage and compost scenarios, AGB differences from baseline are effectively zero (0.0%), confirming that these management practices do not alter crop standing biomass in SIPNET. Drip irrigation and stacked scenarios show a -18.6% AGB reduction, reflecting altered water availability affecting end-of-season residue. AGB is most useful as an indicator of crop productivity differences and residue availability for soil carbon cycling.
:::

## County-Level Aboveground Biomass

### Mixed Comparison: Baseline + Scenario Differences

![Baseline absolute + scenario differences for AGB](../figures/mixed_county_annual_crop_AGB_baseline_plus_diffs.webp){.lightbox group="agb-mixed" fig-alt="Mixed comparison showing baseline AGB alongside scenario differences"}

### All Scenarios Side-by-Side

::: {.panel-tabset}
#### All Scenarios (Absolute)

![Faceted county AGB -- all scenarios](../figures/facet_county_annual_crop_AGB_stock_comparison.webp){.lightbox group="agb-county" fig-alt="Faceted county-level AGB maps for all scenarios"}

#### All Differences from Baseline

![Faceted county AGB differences](../figures/facet_diff_county_annual_crop_AGB_vs_baseline.webp){.lightbox group="agb-county-diff" fig-alt="Faceted county-level AGB difference maps"}
:::

### Individual AGB Scenarios {.tabset}

::: {.panel-tabset}
#### Baseline

![County AGB -- Baseline](../figures/county_baseline_annual_crop_AGB_carbon_stock.webp){.lightbox group="agb-stock" fig-alt="Baseline county total AGB map"}

#### Compost

![County AGB -- Compost](../figures/county_compost_annual_crop_AGB_carbon_stock.webp){.lightbox group="agb-stock" fig-alt="Compost county total AGB map"}

#### Reduced Till

![County AGB -- Reduced Till](../figures/county_reduced_till_annual_crop_AGB_carbon_stock.webp){.lightbox group="agb-stock" fig-alt="Reduced till county total AGB map"}

#### Zero Till

![County AGB -- Zero Till](../figures/county_zero_till_annual_crop_AGB_carbon_stock.webp){.lightbox group="agb-stock" fig-alt="Zero till county total AGB map"}

#### Drip Irrigation

![County AGB -- Drip Irrigation](../figures/county_reduced_irrig_drip_annual_crop_AGB_carbon_stock.webp){.lightbox group="agb-stock" fig-alt="Drip irrigation county total AGB map"}

#### Stacked

![County AGB -- Stacked](../figures/county_stacked_annual_crop_AGB_carbon_stock.webp){.lightbox group="agb-stock" fig-alt="Stacked county total AGB map"}
:::

### Individual AGB Difference Maps {.tabset}

::: {.panel-tabset}
#### Compost

![AGB difference -- Compost vs Baseline](../figures/diff_county_compost_annual_crop_AGB_vs_baseline.webp){.lightbox group="agb-diff" fig-alt="Compost minus baseline AGB difference map"}

#### Reduced Till

![AGB difference -- Reduced Till vs Baseline](../figures/diff_county_reduced_till_annual_crop_AGB_vs_baseline.webp){.lightbox group="agb-diff" fig-alt="Reduced till minus baseline AGB difference map"}

#### Zero Till

![AGB difference -- Zero Till vs Baseline](../figures/diff_county_zero_till_annual_crop_AGB_vs_baseline.webp){.lightbox group="agb-diff" fig-alt="Zero till minus baseline AGB difference map"}

#### Drip Irrigation

![AGB difference -- Drip Irrig. vs Baseline](../figures/diff_county_reduced_irrig_drip_annual_crop_AGB_vs_baseline.webp){.lightbox group="agb-diff" fig-alt="Drip irrigation minus baseline AGB difference map"}

#### Stacked

![AGB difference -- Stacked vs Baseline](../figures/diff_county_stacked_annual_crop_AGB_vs_baseline.webp){.lightbox group="agb-diff" fig-alt="Stacked minus baseline AGB difference map"}
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Field-Level AGB Density

### All Scenarios

::: {.panel-tabset}
#### All Scenarios (Density)

![Faceted field AGB density -- all scenarios](../figures/facet_field_annual_crop_AGB_density_comparison.webp){.lightbox group="agb-field" fig-alt="Faceted field-level AGB density maps"}

#### All Differences from Baseline

![Faceted field AGB differences](../figures/facet_diff_field_annual_crop_AGB_vs_baseline.webp){.lightbox group="agb-field-diff" fig-alt="Faceted field-level AGB difference maps"}
:::

### Individual Field AGB Maps {.tabset}

::: {.panel-tabset}
#### Baseline

![Field AGB density -- Baseline](../figures/field_baseline_annual_crop_AGB_carbon_density.webp){.lightbox group="agb-field-density" fig-alt="Baseline field-level AGB density map"}

#### Compost

![Field AGB density -- Compost](../figures/field_compost_annual_crop_AGB_carbon_density.webp){.lightbox group="agb-field-density" fig-alt="Compost field-level AGB density map"}

#### Reduced Till

![Field AGB density -- Reduced Till](../figures/field_reduced_till_annual_crop_AGB_carbon_density.webp){.lightbox group="agb-field-density" fig-alt="Reduced till field-level AGB density map"}

#### Zero Till

![Field AGB density -- Zero Till](../figures/field_zero_till_annual_crop_AGB_carbon_density.webp){.lightbox group="agb-field-density" fig-alt="Zero till field-level AGB density map"}

#### Drip Irrigation

![Field AGB density -- Drip Irrigation](../figures/field_reduced_irrig_drip_annual_crop_AGB_carbon_density.webp){.lightbox group="agb-field-density" fig-alt="Drip irrigation field-level AGB density map"}

#### Stacked

![Field AGB density -- Stacked](../figures/field_stacked_annual_crop_AGB_carbon_density.webp){.lightbox group="agb-field-density" fig-alt="Stacked field-level AGB density map"}
:::
